info.name: SmartFix API — Full Documented Collection
info.description:
# SmartFix Home Maintenance Platform — API Reference

Complete REST API for the SmartFix graduation project. Connects **Customers** with **Technicians** across 5 specializations.

---

## 🚀 Quick Start

1. **Import** this collection into Postman
2. Set the `baseUrl` variable to `http://localhost:3000`
3. Run **🔐 Auth → Login (Customer)** — `accessToken` is auto-saved
4. Run **🔐 Auth → Login (Technician - Plumber)** — `techAccessToken` is auto-saved
5. All customer requests use `{{accessToken}}` automatically
6. All technician requests override auth with `{{techAccessToken}}`

---

## 🔑 Authentication

All protected endpoints require:
```
Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>
```
Access tokens expire in **15 minutes**. Use `/auth/refresh-token` to get a new one.

---

## 👷 Technician Types

| Value | Label | Icon |
|---|---|---|
| `plumbing` | Plumbing | 🔧 |
| `electricity` | Electricity | ⚡ |
| `painting` | Painting | 🎨 |
| `carpentry` | Carpentry | 🪚 |
| `conditioning` | Air Conditioning | ❄️ |

---

## 📦 Response Envelope

**Success:**
```json
{ "success": true, "data": { ... }, "message": "optional" }
```
**Error:**
```json
{ "success": false, "error": "Human readable", "code": "MACHINE_CODE" }
```
**Paginated:**
```json
{ "success": true, "data": [...], "pagination": { "page": 1, "limit": 20, "total": 85, "pages": 5 } }
```

---

## 🎭 Demo Credentials (after `npm run seed`)

| Role | Email | Password |
|---|---|---|
| Customer | customer@demo.com | Demo1234! |
| Plumber | tech.plumber@demo.com | Demo1234! |
| Electrician | tech.electric@demo.com | Demo1234! |
| Painter | tech.painter@demo.com | Demo1234! |
| Carpenter | tech.carpenter@demo.com | Demo1234! |
| AC Technician | tech.ac@demo.com | Demo1234! |

---

## 🔁 Booking Lifecycle

```
pending → accepted  (technician)
pending → rejected  (technician)
pending → cancelled (customer)
accepted → started  (technician)
accepted → cancelled (customer)
started → completed (technician)
```

---

## 🌐 WebSocket Events

Connect: `ws://localhost:3000?token=<accessToken>`

| Event | Direction | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `message:send` | Client → Server | Send chat message |
| `message:receive` | Server → Client | New message received |
| `message:read` | Server → Client | Message marked read |
| `booking:new-request` | Server → Technician | New booking request |
| `booking:status` | Server → Both | Booking status changed |
| `booking:location` | Server → Customer | Technician GPS update |
| `notification:new` | Server → Client | In-app notification |
| `technician:online` | Server → All | Technician online/offline |
| `payment:confirmed` | Server → Both | Payment success/fail |

variable.description: Base URL of the SmartFix backend server
Customer JWT access token — auto-set on login (expires 15min)
Customer JWT refresh token — auto-set on login (expires 30d)
Technician JWT access token — auto-set on technician login
Target technician userId for booking/review/search requests
MongoDB ObjectId of a saved address
MongoDB ObjectId of a chat message
MongoDB ObjectId of a payment record

item.name: 🔐 Auth
item.description:
Authentication and account management endpoints.

All auth endpoints except `/me`, `/logout`, `/verify-password`, and `/change-password` are **public** (no token required).

Flow:
1. `POST /register` → receive `_devOtp` in response (in production: sent via SMS/email)
2. `POST /verify-otp` → receive `accessToken` + `refreshToken`
3. Use `accessToken` in `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header
4. When token expires (15min), call `POST /refresh-token`
5. On logout, call `POST /logout` to revoke refresh token

request.description:
## Register a new Customer account

Creates a new user with role `customer`. After registration, an OTP is generated and logged to the server console (in production it would be sent via SMS/email).

**Required fields:**
- `name` — full name
- `email` — unique, case-insensitive
- `password` — min 6 characters
- `role` — must be `customer` or `technician`

**Optional fields:**
- `phone` — phone number string

**Response `201`:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "userId": "<ObjectId>",
    "email": "new.customer@demo.com",
    "role": "customer",
    "_devOtp": "123456"
  },
  "message": "Registration successful. Please verify your OTP."
}
```

**Errors:**
- `400 MISSING_FIELDS` — required field missing
- `400 INVALID_ROLE` — role not customer/technician
- `409 DUPLICATE_EMAIL` — email already registered

## Register a new Technician account (Plumber)

Same as customer registration but requires the additional field `technicianType`.

**Extra required field for technicians:**
- `technicianType` — one of: `plumbing` | `electricity` | `painting` | `carpentry` | `conditioning`

A `TechnicianProfile` document is automatically created and linked to the user.

**Errors:**
- `400 MISSING_TECHNICIAN_TYPE` — technicianType not provided
- `400 INVALID_TYPE` — technicianType value not in allowed list

## Register a new Technician account (Electrician)

Registers a technician specializing in **electricity**.

- `technicianType`: `"electricity"`

## Register a new Technician account (Painter)

Registers a technician specializing in **painting**.

- `technicianType`: `"painting"`

## Register a new Technician account (Carpenter)

Registers a technician specializing in **carpentry**.

- `technicianType`: `"carpentry"`

## Register a new Technician account (AC)

Registers a technician specializing in **air conditioning**.

- `technicianType`: `"conditioning"`

## Verify OTP after registration

Confirms the user's identity using the 6-digit OTP sent after registration. On success, returns a full JWT token pair.

**Body:**
- `userId` — returned from `/register`
- `otp` — 6-digit code (check server console in dev mode)

**Response `200`:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "accessToken": "eyJ...",
    "refreshToken": "eyJ...",
    "user": { ... }
  }
}
```

**Errors:**
- `400 INVALID_OTP` — wrong OTP code
- `400 OTP_EXPIRED` — OTP older than 10 minutes
- `400 ALREADY_VERIFIED` — user already verified

## Resend OTP

Generates a new 6-digit OTP and invalidates the previous one. Useful if the user did not receive the first OTP.

**Body:**
- `userId` — returned from `/register`

**Errors:**
- `400 ALREADY_VERIFIED` — user is already verified
- `404 NOT_FOUND` — userId not found

exec: console.log('✅ Customer logged in — accessToken saved');

request.description:
## Login as Customer

Authenticates an existing user and returns a JWT access token (15min) and refresh token (30 days). The test script automatically saves `accessToken`, `refreshToken`, and `userId` to collection variables.

**Body:**
- `email` — registered email address
- `password` — account password

**Response `200`:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "accessToken": "eyJ...",
    "refreshToken": "eyJ...",
    "isVerified": true,
    "user": {
      "_id": "...",
      "name": "Ahmed Ali",
      "email": "customer@demo.com",
      "role": "customer"
    }
  }
}
```

**Errors:**
- `400 MISSING_FIELDS` — email or password missing
- `401 INVALID_CREDENTIALS` — wrong email or password
- `403 DEACTIVATED` — account has been deactivated

exec: console.log('✅ Plumber logged in — techAccessToken saved');

request.description:
## Login as Technician (Plumber)

Logs in the seeded plumber technician. The test script saves `techAccessToken` and `technicianId` to collection variables.

Use `{{techAccessToken}}` as the Bearer token for all **🔧 Technician Dashboard** requests.

exec: console.log('✅ Electrician logged in — techAccessToken saved');

request.description:
## Login as Technician (Electrician)

Logs in the seeded electrician. Saves `techAccessToken` and `technicianId`.

## Login as Technician (Painter)

Logs in the seeded painter. Use the returned token for painting-related technician requests.

## Login as Technician (Carpenter)

Logs in the seeded carpenter.

## Login as Technician (AC)

Logs in the seeded AC technician.

## Get current authenticated user

Returns the full profile of the currently authenticated user. For technicians, also returns their `TechnicianProfile` document.

**Auth:** `Bearer {{accessToken}}`

**Response `200`:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "user": { "_id": "...", "name": "...", "role": "customer", ... },
    "profile": null
  }
}
```
For technicians, `profile` contains their bio, skills, rating, technicianType, etc.

**Errors:**
- `401 NO_TOKEN` — no Authorization header
- `401 INVALID_TOKEN` — expired or invalid token

## Refresh access token

Exchanges a valid refresh token (30d) for a new access token (15min) and a new refresh token. The old refresh token is invalidated (token rotation).

**Body:**
- `refreshToken` — the current refresh token

**Response `200`:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "accessToken": "eyJ...",
    "refreshToken": "eyJ..."
  }
}
```

**Errors:**
- `401 INVALID_TOKEN` — token is expired or malformed
- `401 TOKEN_REVOKED` — token was already used or user logged out

## Request password reset

Generates a 6-digit reset code valid for **15 minutes** and sends it (logged to console in dev mode).

Always returns `200` regardless of whether the email exists — this prevents user enumeration attacks.

**Body:**
- `email` — registered email address

**Response `200`:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": { "_devResetCode": "654321" },
  "message": "If this email exists, a reset code was sent"
}
```

**Errors:**
- `400 MISSING_FIELD` — email not provided

## Reset password using code

Sets a new password using the 6-digit code from `/forgot-password`. All existing sessions are invalidated (refresh token cleared).

**Body:**
- `email` — account email
- `code` — 6-digit reset code
- `newPassword` — new password

**Errors:**
- `400 MISSING_FIELDS` — any field missing
- `400 INVALID_CODE` — wrong code
- `400 CODE_EXPIRED` — code older than 15 minutes

## Verify current password

🔒 **Protected** — requires `Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}`

Verifies the current password before allowing a sensitive change (e.g. showing the change-password form). Used as a pre-check step.

**Body:**
- `password` — the user's current password

**Response `200`:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": { "verified": true },
  "message": "Password verified"
}
```

**Errors:**
- `401 WRONG_PASSWORD` — password does not match

## Change password (while logged in)

🔒 **Protected** — requires `Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}`

Changes the password for the currently authenticated user. Requires the current password for security.

**Body:**
- `currentPassword` — existing password
- `newPassword` — desired new password

**Errors:**
- `400 MISSING_FIELDS` — either field missing
- `401 WRONG_PASSWORD` — currentPassword incorrect

## Logout current session

🔒 **Protected** — requires `Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}`

Revokes the refresh token and clears the FCM push token, ending the current session. The access token becomes useless after its natural expiry (15min).

**Response `200`:**
```json
{ "success": true, "data": null, "message": "Logged out" }
```

item.name: 👤 Profile & Settings
item.description:
User profile management, saved addresses, app settings, and privacy preferences.

All endpoints require `Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}`.

request.description:
## Get full user profile

🔒 **Protected**

Returns the complete profile of the authenticated user including addresses, settings, and privacy preferences. Sensitive fields (`passwordHash`, `refreshToken`, `otpCode`) are excluded.

**Response `200`:** Full user document.

## Update user profile

🔒 **Protected**

Updates editable profile fields. All fields are optional — only provided fields are updated.

**Body (all optional):**
- `name` — display name
- `username` — unique username handle
- `dob` — date of birth (ISO string: `"1995-06-15"`)
- `gender` — `"male"` | `"female"` | `"other"`
- `phone` — phone number string

**Errors:**
- `409 DUPLICATE_KEY` — username already taken

formdata.description: Image file (JPEG, PNG, WebP). Max size: 2MB. Auto-resized to 400×400px.

request.description:
## Upload a profile avatar

🔒 **Protected** | `multipart/form-data`

Uploads a new avatar image to **Cloudinary** (`smartfix/avatars` folder). If an existing avatar is present, it is automatically deleted from Cloudinary before uploading the new one.

**Form field:**
- `avatar` — image file (JPEG, PNG, WebP)
- Max size: **2 MB**
- Auto-transformed to **400×400px crop fill**

**Response `200`:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": { "avatarUrl": "https://res.cloudinary.com/..." },
  "message": "Avatar uploaded"
}
```

**Errors:**
- `400 NO_FILE` — no file attached
- `400` — file too large or wrong format

## Remove profile avatar

🔒 **Protected**

Deletes the current avatar from Cloudinary using the stored `avatarPublicId`, then sets `avatarUrl` and `avatarPublicId` to `null` in the database.

## Get shareable profile link

🔒 **Protected**

Returns a shareable URL for the user's profile, including a referral code for tracking.

**Response `200`:**
```json
{ "success": true, "data": { "shareLink": "http://...?ref=<userId>" } }
```

## Get app invite link

🔒 **Protected**

Returns an invite link to share the app with others, including the user's referral code.

**Response `200`:**
```json
{ "success": true, "data": { "inviteLink": "http://.../invite?ref=<userId>" } }
```

## Add a new saved address

🔒 **Protected**

Adds a new address to the user's address list. If this is the first address, it is automatically set as the default.

**Body:**
- `label` *(required)* — display name, e.g. `"Home"`, `"Work"`
- `lat` *(required)* — latitude (float)
- `lng` *(required)* — longitude (float)

**Response `201`:** Updated list of all addresses.

**Errors:**
- `400 MISSING_FIELDS` — label, lat, or lng missing

## Update a saved address

🔒 **Protected**

Updates an existing address by its `_id`. All fields are optional.

**URL Param:** `:id` — the `_id` of the address subdocument

**Body (all optional):**
- `label`, `lat`, `lng`

**Errors:**
- `404 NOT_FOUND` — address id not found in user's list

## Set address as default

🔒 **Protected**

Sets the specified address as the default, and unsets all other addresses. The default address is pre-filled when creating bookings.

**URL Param:** `:id` — address `_id`

**Response `200`:** Updated list of all addresses.

## Delete a saved address

🔒 **Protected**

**URL Param:** `:id` — address `_id`

**Response `200`:** Updated list of remaining addresses.

**Errors:**
- `404 NOT_FOUND` — address not found

## Update app language

🔒 **Protected**

**Body:**
- `language` — `"en"` or `"ar"`

**Errors:**
- `400 INVALID_VALUE` — language not `en` or `ar`

## Update app theme

🔒 **Protected**

**Body:**
- `theme` — `"light"` or `"dark"`

**Errors:**
- `400 INVALID_VALUE` — theme not `light` or `dark`

## Update privacy preferences

🔒 **Protected**

All fields are optional booleans.

**Body (all optional):**
- `showPhone` — whether phone number is visible to technicians
- `showEmail` — whether email is visible
- `showOnlineStatus` — whether online status is visible

## Deactivate account

🔒 **Protected**

Sets the user's `isActive` to `false`. The account is not hard-deleted — it is deactivated and will be rejected on future login attempts.

**Response `200`:**
```json
{ "success": true, "data": null, "message": "Account deactivated" }
```

item.name: 📄 Content
item.description: Static content endpoints. These are **public** — no authentication required.

request.description:
## Get Privacy Policy

🌐 **Public** — no auth required

Returns the app's privacy policy as a plain text string.

**Response `200`:**
```json
{ "success": true, "data": { "content": "SmartFix Privacy Policy..." } }
```

## Get current app version

🌐 **Public** — no auth required

Returns the current API version string from the `APP_VERSION` environment variable.

**Response `200`:**
```json
{ "success": true, "data": { "version": "1.0.0" } }
```

item.name: 🏠 Home & Discovery
item.description:
Home feed, category browsing, service discovery, and technician search.

All endpoints require `Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}`.

### Technician Type Filter
Many endpoints accept `?type=` to filter by specialization:
- `plumbing` 🔧
- `electricity` ⚡
- `painting` 🎨
- `carpentry` 🪚
- `conditioning` ❄️

request.description:
## Get home screen data

🔒 **Protected**

Returns all data needed for the home screen in a single request:
- `banners` — promotional banners with type tags
- `categories` — up to 8 active categories
- `featuredServices` — up to 6 active services with category info
- `topTechnicians` — up to 4 online technicians sorted by rating

**Response `200`:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "banners": [...],
    "categories": [...],
    "featuredServices": [...],
    "topTechnicians": [...]
  }
}
```

## Get promotional banners

🔒 **Protected**

Returns the list of promotional banners for the home carousel. Each banner includes a `type` field linking it to a technician specialization.

**Response `200`:** Array of banner objects with `id`, `title`, `subtitle`, `imageUrl`, `type`.

## Get all technician type definitions

🔒 **Protected**

Returns the full list of valid technician types with their labels and icons. Use this to populate type-selector UI components.

**Response `200`:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": [
    { "type": "plumbing",     "label": "Plumbing",          "icon": "🔧" },
    { "type": "electricity",  "label": "Electricity",        "icon": "⚡" },
    { "type": "painting",     "label": "Painting",           "icon": "🎨" },
    { "type": "carpentry",    "label": "Carpentry",          "icon": "🪚" },
    { "type": "conditioning", "label": "Conditioning",       "icon": "❄️" }
  ]
}
```

## Get all active categories

🔒 **Protected**

Returns all active categories sorted by `technicianType` then `name`.

**Query params (all optional):**
- `type` — filter by technician type (`plumbing` | `electricity` | `painting` | `carpentry` | `conditioning`)

**Response `200`:** Array of category objects with `_id`, `name`, `technicianType`, `icon`, `description`, `isActive`.

## Get categories filtered by type: Plumbing 🔧

🔒 **Protected**

Returns only categories with `technicianType: "plumbing"`.

## Get categories filtered by type: Electricity ⚡

🔒 **Protected**

## Get categories filtered by type: Painting 🎨

🔒 **Protected**

## Get categories filtered by type: Carpentry 🪚

🔒 **Protected**

## Get categories filtered by type: Air Conditioning ❄️

🔒 **Protected**

## Get a single category

🔒 **Protected**

**URL Param:** `:id` — category `_id`

**Errors:**
- `404 NOT_FOUND` — category not found

## Get services under a category

🔒 **Protected** | Paginated

Returns all active services belonging to the specified category.

**URL Param:** `:id` — category `_id`

**Query params:**
- `page` — page number (default: 1)
- `limit` — results per page (default: 20, max: 100)

**Response `200`:** Paginated list of service objects.

## Get all services

🔒 **Protected** | Paginated

Returns all active services with optional filtering.

**Query params (all optional):**
- `type` — filter by technician type (`plumbing`, `electricity`, `painting`, `carpentry`, `conditioning`)
- `category` — filter by category `_id`
- `minPrice` — minimum price (number)
- `maxPrice` — maximum price (number)
- `page`, `limit` — pagination

**Response `200`:** Paginated list. Each service includes populated `categoryId` with `name`, `icon`, `technicianType`.

## Get services filtered by type: Plumbing 🔧

🔒 **Protected** | Paginated

Returns services from all categories with `technicianType: "plumbing"`. Seed data includes: *Fix Leak*, *Pipe Installation*, *Water Heater Service*.

## Get services filtered by type: Electricity ⚡

Seed data includes: *Install Socket*, *Full Wiring Check*, *Breaker Repair*.

## Get services filtered by type: Painting 🎨

Seed data includes: *Room Painting*, *Exterior Painting*.

## Get services filtered by type: Carpentry 🪚

Seed data includes: *Door Fitting*, *Shelving Installation*.

## Get services filtered by type: Air Conditioning ❄️

Seed data includes: *AC Installation*, *AC Service & Cleaning*.

## Get services with price range filter

🔒 **Protected** | Paginated

Returns services priced between $20 and $80. Both `minPrice` and `maxPrice` are optional and can be used independently.

## Get a single service

🔒 **Protected**

Returns full service details including the populated category (with `name`, `icon`, `technicianType`, `description`).

**URL Param:** `:id` — service `_id`

**Errors:**
- `404 NOT_FOUND` — service not found

## Search services by keyword

🔒 **Protected** | Paginated

Case-insensitive regex search across service `name` and `description`.

**Query params:**
- `q` *(required)* — search keyword
- `type` *(optional)* — restrict search to a specific technician type
- `page`, `limit` — pagination

**Errors:**
- `400 MISSING_PARAM` — `q` not provided

## Search services — restricted to electricity type

Searches for services with keyword `"install"` within the `electricity` category only.

exec: const uid = t[0].userId && t[0].userId._id ? t[0].userId._id : t[0].userId;

request.description:
## Search all technicians

🔒 **Protected** | Paginated

Returns technician profiles sorted by rating descending.

**Query params (all optional):**
- `type` — filter by `technicianType` (`plumbing` | `electricity` | `painting` | `carpentry` | `conditioning`)
- `rating` — minimum rating (e.g. `4` returns >= 4.0)
- `isOnline` — `true` or `false`
- `page`, `limit` — pagination

**Response `200`:** Paginated list. Each item is a `TechnicianProfile` with `userId` populated (`name`, `avatarUrl`, `email`, `phone`).

## Search technicians — Plumbing specialists 🔧

🔒 **Protected** | Paginated

## Search technicians — Electricity specialists ⚡

🔒 **Protected** | Paginated

## Search technicians — Painting specialists 🎨

🔒 **Protected** | Paginated

## Search technicians — Carpentry specialists 🪚

🔒 **Protected** | Paginated

## Search technicians — AC specialists ❄️

🔒 **Protected** | Paginated

## Search online technicians with rating ≥ 4

🔒 **Protected** | Paginated

Combines `rating` and `isOnline` filters.

## Get nearby online technicians

🔒 **Protected**

Uses MongoDB **2dsphere** geospatial index to find online technicians sorted by distance. Only returns technicians where `isOnline: true`.

**Query params:**
- `lat` *(required)* — user's latitude
- `lng` *(required)* — user's longitude
- `radius` *(optional)* — search radius in **meters** (default: 10000 = 10km)
- `type` *(optional)* — filter by technician type

**Response `200`:** Array of up to 20 nearby TechnicianProfile documents (no pagination — geospatial query).

**Errors:**
- `400 MISSING_PARAMS` — lat or lng not provided

## Get nearby plumbers within 10km 🔧

🔒 **Protected**

## Get nearby electricians within 10km ⚡

🔒 **Protected**

## Get nearby painters within 10km 🎨

🔒 **Protected**

## Get nearby carpenters within 10km 🪚

🔒 **Protected**

## Get nearby AC technicians within 10km ❄️

🔒 **Protected**

## Get technician public profile

🔒 **Protected**

Returns the technician's user info, their full `TechnicianProfile`, and the 5 most recent reviews.

**URL Param:** `:id` — technician's **user** `_id`

**Response `200`:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "user": { "_id": "...", "name": "...", "avatarUrl": "...", "role": "technician" },
    "profile": {
      "technicianType": "plumbing",
      "bio": "...",
      "skills": [...],
      "experienceYears": 8,
      "rating": 4.8,
      "totalReviews": 12,
      "isOnline": true
    },
    "recentReviews": [...]
  }
}
```

**Errors:**
- `404 NOT_FOUND` — user not found or not a technician

item.name: 📅 Bookings (Customer)
item.description:
Booking lifecycle management from the **customer** perspective.

All endpoints require `Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}` (customer token).

### Booking Status Flow
```
pending → accepted  (by technician)
pending → rejected  (by technician)
pending → cancelled (by customer)
accepted → started  (by technician)
accepted → cancelled (by customer)
started → completed (by technician)
```
Any transition outside these rules returns `400 INVALID_TRANSITION`.

request.description:
## Create a new booking

🔒 **Protected** | Role: `customer`

Creates a new booking with status `pending`. After creation:
- A **WebSocket** event `booking:new-request` is emitted to the technician's room
- A **FCM push notification** is sent to the technician

**Body:**
- `serviceId` *(required)* — `_id` of the service
- `technicianId` *(required)* — `_id` of the technician **user**
- `scheduledAt` *(required)* — ISO date string for the appointment
- `addressId` *(optional)* — `_id` of a saved address; if provided, snapshot is stored
- `notes` *(optional)* — additional instructions for the technician

**Response `201`:** Full booking document with populated `serviceId` and `customerId`.

**Errors:**
- `400 MISSING_FIELDS` — required field missing
- `404 NOT_FOUND` — serviceId or technicianId not found
- `403 FORBIDDEN` — only customers can create bookings

## Get all bookings for current user

🔒 **Protected** | Paginated

Returns bookings where the current user is the **customer** (or technician, if logged in as technician). Sorted by creation date descending.

**Query params (all optional):**
- `status` — filter by status: `pending` | `accepted` | `rejected` | `started` | `completed` | `cancelled`
- `page`, `limit` — pagination

**Response `200`:** Paginated booking list with populated `serviceId`, `customerId`, `technicianId`.

## Get pending bookings

🔒 **Protected** | Paginated

Returns only bookings with `status: "pending"` — awaiting technician response.

## Get completed bookings

🔒 **Protected** | Paginated

Returns only bookings with `status: "completed"`. These are eligible for reviews and payments.

## Get a single booking

🔒 **Protected**

Returns full booking details. Only accessible by the **customer** or **technician** of that specific booking.

**URL Param:** `:id` — booking `_id`

**Errors:**
- `404 NOT_FOUND` — booking not found
- `403 FORBIDDEN` — current user is not a participant

## Get live technician location

🔒 **Protected**

Returns the technician's current GPS location. **Only available when booking status is `started`.**

For real-time updates during an active job, listen to the WebSocket event `booking:location` in the booking room.

**Response `200`:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "bookingId": "...",
    "location": { "lat": 30.05, "lng": 31.24 },
    "technicianLocation": { "lat": 30.04, "lng": 31.23 }
  }
}
```

**Errors:**
- `400 NOT_ACTIVE` — booking is not in `started` status
- `404 NOT_FOUND` — booking not found

## Reschedule a booking

🔒 **Protected** | Role: `customer`

Only `pending` bookings can be rescheduled. The original booking is **cancelled** and a **new booking** is created with the new date. Both parties are notified via WebSocket.

**Body:**
- `scheduledAt` *(required)* — new ISO date string

**Response `200`:** New booking document.

**Errors:**
- `400 MISSING_FIELD` — scheduledAt not provided
- `400 INVALID_TRANSITION` — booking is not in `pending` status
- `403 FORBIDDEN` — only the customer of this booking can reschedule

## Cancel a booking

🔒 **Protected** | Role: `customer`

Cancels a `pending` or `accepted` booking. Cannot cancel a `started`, `completed`, or `rejected` booking.

Both parties receive a **WebSocket** `booking:status` event.

**Errors:**
- `400 INVALID_TRANSITION` — booking status does not allow cancellation
- `403 FORBIDDEN` — only the customer can cancel

## Report a booking issue/dispute

🔒 **Protected** | Role: `customer`

Flags a booking with a dispute reason. Sets `reportedAt` and `reportReason` on the booking document.

**Body:**
- `reason` *(required)* — description of the issue

**Errors:**
- `400 MISSING_FIELD` — reason not provided
- `403 FORBIDDEN` — only the customer of this booking can report

item.name: 🔧 Technician Dashboard
item.description:
Booking management and profile tools for **technicians only**.

⚠️ All requests in this folder use `{{techAccessToken}}`. Make sure to run one of the **Technician login** requests first.

Each request overrides the collection-level auth with `Bearer {{techAccessToken}}`.

request.description:
## Technician dashboard summary

🔒 **Protected** | Role: `technician`

Returns aggregated stats for the technician's home screen.

**Response `200`:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "pendingRequests": 2,
    "activeJobs": 1,
    "completedJobs": 15,
    "totalEarnings": 450.00
  }
}
```

## Get incoming booking requests

🔒 **Protected** | Role: `technician` | Paginated

Returns all bookings with `status: "pending"` assigned to the current technician. Sorted by creation date descending.

These are the bookings the technician can **Accept** or **Reject**.

## Get all technician jobs

🔒 **Protected** | Role: `technician` | Paginated

Returns all bookings assigned to the current technician across all statuses.

**Query params (optional):**
- `status` — filter by booking status
- `page`, `limit`

## Accept a booking request

🔒 **Protected** | Role: `technician`

Transitions booking from `pending` → `accepted`.

Triggers:
- **WebSocket** `booking:status` to both customer and technician
- **FCM push** `booking_accepted` to customer

**Errors:**
- `400 INVALID_TRANSITION` — booking is not in `pending` status
- `403 FORBIDDEN` — this booking doesn't belong to the current technician

## Reject a booking request

🔒 **Protected** | Role: `technician`

Transitions booking from `pending` → `rejected`. The optional `reason` is stored in `rejectionReason`.

Triggers:
- **WebSocket** `booking:status` to both parties
- **FCM push** `booking_rejected` to customer

**Body (optional):**
- `reason` — explanation for the customer

## Mark job as started

🔒 **Protected** | Role: `technician`

Transitions booking from `accepted` → `started`. This enables:
- Live GPS tracking (customer can call `GET /bookings/:id/tracking`)
- The technician should start sending location updates via `POST /technician/location`

Triggers:
- **WebSocket** `booking:status`
- **FCM push** `booking_started` to customer

## Mark job as completed

🔒 **Protected** | Role: `technician`

Transitions booking from `started` → `completed`. After this:
- Customer can submit a **review**
- Customer can **pay** via `/payments/checkout`

Triggers:
- **WebSocket** `booking:status`
- **FCM push** `booking_completed` to customer

## Toggle technician online/offline

🔒 **Protected** | Role: `technician`

Updates `isOnline` on the technician's profile. Only online technicians appear in:
- `GET /technicians/nearby`
- The default technician search

Emits **WebSocket** `technician:online` broadcast to all connected clients.

**Body:**
- `isOnline` *(required)* — `true` or `false`

## Send real-time GPS location

🔒 **Protected** | Role: `technician`

Updates the technician's current coordinates. Should be called periodically while on a job.

If there is an **active (`started`) booking**, also:
- Updates `trackingLocation` on the booking document
- Emits **WebSocket** `booking:location` to the customer

**Body:**
- `lat` *(required)* — current latitude
- `lng` *(required)* — current longitude

**Note:** Call this every ~10–30 seconds during an active job for smooth tracking.

## Update technician profile

🔒 **Protected** | Role: `technician`

Updates the `TechnicianProfile` document for the current technician. All fields optional.

**Body (all optional):**
- `technicianType` — `plumbing` | `electricity` | `painting` | `carpentry` | `conditioning`
- `bio` — professional bio text
- `skills` — array of skill strings
- `experienceYears` — number

**Errors:**
- `400 INVALID_TYPE` — technicianType not in valid list

## Upload verification document

🔒 **Protected** | Role: `technician` | `multipart/form-data`

Uploads a document to Cloudinary (`smartfix/documents`) and appends it to the technician's `documents` array.

**Form fields:**
- `document` *(required)* — PDF or image file (JPEG, PNG). Max **10 MB**.
- `type` *(optional)* — document type: `"identity"` | `"certification"` | `"other"` (default: `"other"`)

**Response `201`:** Updated `documents` array.

**Errors:**
- `400 NO_FILE` — no file attached

## Get earnings summary

🔒 **Protected** | Role: `technician`

Returns aggregated earnings across time periods. Only counts payments with `status: "success"` linked to the technician's completed bookings.

**Response `200`:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "today": 30.00,
    "thisWeek": 120.00,
    "total": 450.00
  }
}
```

> Display-only. No actual payout/bank transfer logic.

## Get per-job earnings history

🔒 **Protected** | Role: `technician` | Paginated

Returns a paginated list of successful payment records linked to the technician's completed bookings, each populated with the booking and service name.

**Query params:**
- `page`, `limit` — pagination

item.name: 💬 Chat
item.description:
Real-time messaging between customer and technician within a booking.

All endpoints require `Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}`.

**Rules:**
- One chat thread per booking (identified by `bookingId`)
- Only the **customer** and **technician** of that booking can access messages
- For real-time delivery, use WebSocket events `message:send` / `message:receive`
- File/image uploads go to Cloudinary (`smartfix/chat` folder)

request.description:
## Get all chat conversations

🔒 **Protected**

Returns all chat threads for the current user — one entry per booking. Each entry includes:
- The booking info (service, customer, technician)
- The most recent message
- Unread message count

**Response `200`:** Array of `{ booking, lastMessage, unreadCount }` sorted by booking `updatedAt` descending.

## Get message history for a booking chat

🔒 **Protected** | Paginated

Returns messages sorted oldest-first (ascending `createdAt`). Each message includes the populated `senderId` (`name`, `avatarUrl`).

**URL Param:** `:bookingId` — booking `_id`

**Query params:**
- `page`, `limit` — pagination

**Errors:**
- `403 FORBIDDEN` — current user is not a participant in this booking
- `404 NOT_FOUND` — booking not found

## Send a text message

🔒 **Protected**

Sends a text message in the booking chat thread.

After saving to DB:
- Emits **WebSocket** `message:receive` to the booking room
- Sends **FCM push** `chat_message` to the other party

**Body:**
- `content` *(required)* — message text

**Response `201`:** Created message with `senderId` populated.

**Errors:**
- `400 MISSING_FIELD` — content not provided
- `403 FORBIDDEN` — not a booking participant

formdata.description: Image or file attachment. Max 10MB. Images: JPEG, PNG, WebP. Files: PDF.

request.description:
## Send a file or image attachment

🔒 **Protected** | `multipart/form-data`

Uploads a file to Cloudinary (`smartfix/chat`) and creates a message with `type: "image"` or `type: "file"`.

**Form field:**
- `file` *(required)* — attachment (JPEG, PNG, WebP, PDF). Max **10 MB**.

Type is auto-detected based on MIME type:
- `image/*` → `type: "image"`
- Others → `type: "file"`

Also emits WebSocket `message:receive` and FCM push to the other party.

**Errors:**
- `400 NO_FILE` — no file attached

## Mark a message as read

🔒 **Protected**

Sets `isRead: true` on the specified message. Also emits **WebSocket** `message:read` to the booking room so the sender can see a read receipt.

**URL Params:**
- `:bookingId` — booking `_id`
- `:id` — message `_id`

**Errors:**
- `404 NOT_FOUND` — message not found
- `403 FORBIDDEN` — not a booking participant

item.name: 🔔 Notifications
item.description:
In-app notification management and push token registration.

All endpoints require `Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}`.

Notifications are automatically created when:
- A new booking request arrives (→ technician)
- A booking is accepted/rejected (→ customer)
- A job is started/completed (→ customer)
- A new chat message is received
- A payment is confirmed

request.description:
## Get all notifications

🔒 **Protected** | Paginated

Returns all notifications for the current user sorted by `createdAt` descending.

**Query params:**
- `page`, `limit` — pagination

**Response `200`:** Paginated list of notification objects with `title`, `body`, `type`, `refId`, `isRead`, `createdAt`.

**Notification types:** `booking_request`, `booking_accepted`, `booking_rejected`, `booking_started`, `booking_completed`, `chat_message`, `payment_confirmed`

## Mark a single notification as read

🔒 **Protected**

**URL Param:** `:id` — notification `_id`

**Errors:**
- `404 NOT_FOUND` — notification not found or belongs to another user

## Mark all notifications as read

🔒 **Protected**

Sets `isRead: true` on all unread notifications belonging to the current user in a single bulk update.

## Delete a notification

🔒 **Protected**

**URL Param:** `:id` — notification `_id`

**Errors:**
- `404 NOT_FOUND` — notification not found or belongs to another user

## Register FCM device token

🔒 **Protected**

Saves the Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) device token to the user's profile. This token is used to send push notifications to the user's device.

Call this on app launch after obtaining the token from the Firebase SDK.

**Body:**
- `token` *(required)* — FCM registration token from the device

**Errors:**
- `400 MISSING_FIELD` — token not provided

## Remove FCM device token

🔒 **Protected**

Clears the FCM token from the user's profile. Call this on logout to stop receiving push notifications on this device.

## Update notification preferences

🔒 **Protected**

Toggles which notification categories the user receives. All fields are optional booleans.

**Body (all optional):**
- `bookingUpdates` — booking status change notifications
- `chatMessages` — new message notifications
- `promotions` — promotional / marketing notifications

item.name: ⭐ Reviews
item.description:
Rating and review system for completed bookings.

**Rules:**
- Only allowed after booking `status === 'completed'`
- Only the **customer** of that booking can submit a review
- One review per booking (unique index enforced)
- Edit window: **24 hours** after submission
- Rating: integer from **1** to **5**
- After each review, the technician's average `rating` and `totalReviews` are automatically recalculated

request.description:
## Submit a review for a completed booking

🔒 **Protected** | Role: `customer`

Creates a review and automatically recalculates the technician's average rating.

**Body:**
- `bookingId` *(required)* — must be a `completed` booking by this customer
- `rating` *(required)* — integer `1`–`5`
- `comment` *(optional)* — text review

**Response `201`:** Created review document.

**Errors:**
- `400 MISSING_FIELDS` — bookingId or rating not provided
- `400 INVALID_RATING` — rating outside 1–5
- `400 INVALID_STATE` — booking not completed
- `403 FORBIDDEN` — only the customer can review
- `409 DUPLICATE` — review already submitted for this booking

## Get review for a specific booking

🔒 **Protected**

Returns the review associated with a booking (one review per booking max). The `customerId` is populated with `name` and `avatarUrl`.

**URL Param:** `:bookingId` — booking `_id`

**Errors:**
- `404 NOT_FOUND` — no review exists for this booking

## Edit a review (within 24h window)

🔒 **Protected** | Role: `customer`

Allows editing the rating and/or comment within **24 hours** of submission. After the edit window closes, the review is permanently locked.

**URL Param:** `:id` — review `_id`

**Body (all optional):**
- `rating` — new rating (1–5)
- `comment` — updated text

After editing, recalculates the technician's average rating.

**Errors:**
- `400 EDIT_EXPIRED` — 24-hour edit window has passed
- `403 FORBIDDEN` — not the author of this review
- `404 NOT_FOUND` — review not found

## Get all reviews for a technician

🔒 **Protected** | Paginated

Returns all reviews for the specified technician, sorted by `createdAt` descending. Customer details (`name`, `avatarUrl`) are populated.

**URL Param:** `:id` — technician's user `_id`

**Query params:**
- `page`, `limit` — pagination

item.name: 💳 Payments
item.description:
Sandbox payment processing using **Stripe Test Mode**.

> ⚠️ No real money is charged. This is a demo/sandbox environment.

**Test card numbers (Stripe):**
- `4242 4242 4242 4242` — Always succeeds
- Any future expiry date and any 3-digit CVC

**Flow:**
1. Complete a booking (`status: completed`)
2. Call `POST /payments/checkout` with the `bookingId`
3. Payment is auto-confirmed (sandbox mode)
4. WebSocket `payment:confirmed` fires to both parties
5. FCM push `payment_confirmed` sent to customer

request.description:
## Add a payment method (sandbox)

🔒 **Protected**

Adds a test payment method. In production, this would tokenize a real card via the Stripe SDK.

**Body (all optional — sandbox defaults apply):**
- `last4` — last 4 digits of test card
- `expMonth` — expiry month
- `expYear` — expiry year

**Response `201`:** The new payment method object.

## Remove a payment method

🔒 **Protected**

**URL Param:** `:id` — payment method id (e.g. `card_test_1`)

## Pay for a completed booking (sandbox)

🔒 **Protected** | Role: `customer`

Initiates and immediately confirms a sandbox payment for the booking's invoice amount.

**Flow:**
1. Creates a `PaymentIntent` in Stripe Test Mode (or a demo ref if no Stripe key)
2. Auto-confirms the payment
3. Sets payment `status: "success"`
4. Emits **WebSocket** `payment:confirmed` to both customer and technician
5. Sends **FCM push** `payment_confirmed` to customer

**Body:**
- `bookingId` *(required)* — must belong to the current customer

**Response `200`:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "paymentId": "...",
    "status": "success",
    "amount": 30
  },
  "message": "Payment successful"
}
```

**Errors:**
- `400 MISSING_FIELD` — bookingId not provided
- `400 ALREADY_PAID` — booking has already been paid
- `403 FORBIDDEN` — booking doesn't belong to this customer
- `404 NOT_FOUND` — booking or service not found

## Get payment history

🔒 **Protected** | Paginated

Returns all payment records for the current customer, sorted by date descending. Each record includes the booking's `scheduledAt` and `status`.

**Query params:**
- `page`, `limit` — pagination

## Get a specific payment record

🔒 **Protected**

Returns full details of a payment including the booking document.

**URL Param:** `:id` — payment `_id`

**Errors:**
- `404 NOT_FOUND` — payment not found
- `403 FORBIDDEN` — payment belongs to another customer
